de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures

Class MergeWithLatticeAbstraction

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.MergeProcedure
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures.MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ParametricMergeProcedure
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    MergeWithPredicateAbstraction

    public abstract class MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
extends MergeProcedure
implements ParametricMergeProcedure
    Rule that merges two sequents based on a specified set of abstract domain lattices. If no lattice is specified for a given sort, the rule proceeds such that program variables are unchanged if they are equal in both states and applies the if-then-else construction otherwise.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.MergeProcedure

    • Constructor Detail

      • MergeWithLatticeAbstraction

        public MergeWithLatticeAbstraction()

    • Method Detail

      • getAbstractDomainForSort

        protected abstract AbstractDomainLattice getAbstractDomainForSort(Sort s,
                                                                  Services services)
        Returns the abstract domain lattice for the given sort or null if there has no lattice been specified for that sort.
        Parameters:
        s - The sort to return the matching lattice for.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        The abstract domain lattice suitable for the given sort. Return null if there is no abstract domain for that sort; in this case, an if-then-else merge will be performed.

      • getUserChoices

        public abstract java.util.LinkedHashMap<ProgramVariable,AbstractDomainElement> getUserChoices()
        Returns:
        Manually chosen lattice elements for program variables.

      • complete

        public boolean complete()
        Description copied from class: MergeProcedure
        Similar to AbstractBuiltInRuleApp.complete(). Method was introduced for predicate abstraction (which is not complete if the abstraction predicates are not set).
        Specified by:
        complete in class MergeProcedure
        Returns:
        true iff the merge procedure is complete (all neede parameters are set).

      • mergeValuesInStates

        public MergeProcedure.ValuesMergeResult mergeValuesInStates(Term v,
                                                            SymbolicExecutionState state1,
                                                            Term valueInState1,
                                                            SymbolicExecutionState state2,
                                                            Term valueInState2,
                                                            Term distinguishingFormula,
                                                            Services services)
        Description copied from class: MergeProcedure
        Merges two values valueInState1 and valueInState2 of corresponding SE states state1 and state2 to a new value of a merge state.
        Specified by:
        mergeValuesInStates in class MergeProcedure
        Parameters:
        v - The variable for which the values should be merged
        state1 - First SE state.
        valueInState1 - Value in state1.
        state2 - Second SE state.
        valueInState2 - Value in state2.
        distinguishingFormula - The user-specified distinguishing formula. May be null (for automatic generation).
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        The merge result.

      • requiresDistinguishablePathConditions

        public boolean requiresDistinguishablePathConditions()
        Specified by:
        requiresDistinguishablePathConditions in class MergeProcedure
        Returns:
        true iff the merge procedure requires distinguishable path conditions. This is usually the case for procedures working with concrete values of input states, and can be false for abstraction methods.
